LayoutData.CloseMessage: Do you want to close this popup?

Children.Help: This sets a fixed duration for how long the profiler will record the events.

Children.Items:
Manual
Compile / Project Load
MIDI Input
Mouse click
Children.Help:
This determines the event that starts the recording

- **Manual**: start recording when the record button is clicked (or `Threads.startProfiling()` is called.
- **Compile / Project load**: Start the recording when the script is compiled (or the project is loaded). Use this to profile the compilation / onInit callback.
- **MIDI Input**: Start the recording the next time a MIDI note on / off message is processed.
- **Mouse Click** Start the recording when you click on your Interface.

Children.Items:
Audio Thread
UI Thread
Scripting Thread
Loading Thread
Worker Thread
Server Thread

Children.Help:
Select all threads to be recorded and shown in the timeline.

This filter will be applied during recording, so any thread that is not selected will not be recorded in the profile.

> This can be used to filter out threads that you don't want to analyse (eg. the UI thread when profiling the DSP performance).

Children.Items:
Lock
Script
Scriptnode
Callback
Broadcaster
Paint
DSP
Trace
Server
Background Task

Children.Help:
Select all event types to be recorded and shown in the timeline.

This filter will be applied dynamically after recording and can be used to show / hide certain event types.

> This can be used to filter out events that you don't want to see (eg. Paint callbacks if you're profiling the DSP performance).
